name: ALX ONCOLOGY HOLDINGS INC
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. BUSINESS Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company advancing a pipeline of novel therapies designed to treat cancer and extend patients lives. Our clinical pipeline includes two clinical-stage product candidates, the CD47 blocker evorpacept and an epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR)-targeted antibody drug candidate (ADC) ALX2004.
